title: Custom Yosys Passes Result in Faulty Synthesis and Simulation Errors

features.name: signed_ternary_in_shift_amount
features.description: Code should include a right shift operation where the shift amount uses a concatenation containing a $signed() cast result

features.name: signed_ternary_condition
features.description: Code should include a ternary operator where the condition is $signed() applied to a single-bit constant

features.name: unary_plus_on_register
features.description: Code should include a unary plus operator applied to a register in a ternary expression

features.name: non_constant_part_select_ternary_result
features.description: Code should include a part-select of a register where the result of a ternary operator is used as the index
